settings.title: Nose Piercing Guide
settings.text: Everything You Need to Know About Nose Piercings: Styles, Care, and Jewellery

Nose piercings are one of the most popular and versatile forms of body art, celebrated for their cultural significance and aesthetic appeal. With a rich history spanning cultures and traditions, nose piercings allow for personal expression through a variety of styles and placements. At Monster Piercing, we have an array of nose jewellery to choose from to create the style you want. Whether its a sleek, minimalist hoop or bold septum hoop, we have it all and more!

settings.heading: Know your Piercings
settings.subheading:
From the classic nostril piercing to the bold septum piercing or intricate options like the bridge or high nostril piercing, there’s a style to suit everyone. Nose piercings can be adorned with studs, hoops, or clickers in various materials, making them a timeless accessory that enhances individuality and complements any look. Read on to know the variety of nose piercings that can be adorned.

At our store, we offer a stunning range of hypoallergenic, high-quality jewellery to suit all classic nose piercings. From sleek studs to delicate hoops, our collection is designed to help you express your unique style with timeless elegance.

settings.heading: Nostril Piercings
settings.subheading:
As the name suggests, positioned on the nostril, one of the most common and classic nose piercings around the world. A dainty stud or sleek golden hoop can lift up your look by far and the best thing about nostril piercings are, they can be changed easily and regular to suit your vibe and mood!

JEWELLERY: Nose studs (L-Bend, Screw, Bone), Seamless Hoops, Segment Clickers, Captive Bead Rings (BCR's), Flat Back Studs

STANDARD SIZE: 20G (0.8mm) is the most common size although, 22G (0.6mm) & 18G (1.0mm) are also used depending on individuals preferred jewellery thickness & choice. 6-8mm stud length is used & 8-10mm diameter hoops.

DOWNSIZE: 6mm length studs & 8mm diameter hoops are extremely common sizes when downsizing for a more sleek & snug jewellery fit.

HEALING TIME: Initial healing time can take up to 6-12 weeks although full healing can take up to 6-12 months where you can easily change your jewellery without causing irritation.

PAIN LEVEL: Nostril piercings are known to be of low pain.

PRO-TIP: Work with an experienced piercer who can assess your anatomy and suggest the most flattering and functional placement.

settings.heading: Septum Piercings
settings.subheading:
A septum piercing passes through the thin strip of tissue (the"sweet spot") at the bottom of the septum, just above the cartilage. This piercing has gained immense popularity due to its edgy aesthetic and the ability to hide or showcase it depending on the jewellery style. There are an array of jewellery piercings at Monster Piercing to adorn your septum with as well as stretching options if that's your look!

JEWELLERY: Horseshoe Barbells (CBB's), Captive Bead Rings (BCR's), Segment Clickers, Seamless Hoops, Septum Clickers, Heavy Gauge Rings

STANDARD SIZE: 16G (1.2mm) or 14G (1.6mm) more commonly used for stretching. 8mm is the most common diameter size for a snug, flush look. 10mm & 12mm diameter jewellery are also common for those aiming for a looser or noticeable look.

DOWNSIZE: 8mm is a good fit although you can downsize to 6mm diameter jewellery pieces for a more minimalist look.

HEALING TIME: Minimum healing time of 6-8weeks however aim to only change jewellery once fully healed at 2-6 months.

PAIN LEVEL: Low-Moderate pain level only

PRO-TIP: Once healed, invest in clickers or seamless rings for stylish and secure alternatives. If discretion is a priority, choose a retainer or a flippable circular barbell for work or formal settings

settings.heading: Combination Piercings
settings.subheading: Combination nose piercings involve pairing or grouping multiple piercing styles on the nose for a curated, dramatic, or artistic look. This approach allows for unique customisation and expression while enhancing the natural shape of the nose. With a variety of combination piercings you can explore, there are even more options of jewellery at Monster Piercing for you to mix & match from.

settings.heading: Nose Piercing Aftercare
settings.subheading: Use saline solution with cotton pad and clean the area twice daily to remove residue and any build-up. Avoid fiddling with the jewellery or piercing area and let the healing process take place on its own also ensuring the pierced area is kept dry. Refrain from changing the jewellery frequently and avoid the use of makeup/skincare or alcohol until the piercing is healed well.
